title: Squirrel Removal in Irvington, NY | $900-$2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Irvington, Westchester. Humane extraction, exclusion & damage repair. Licensed experts serving historic Irvington homes. Call today!
intro: Squirrels in Irvington's historic homes and mature tree-lined neighborhoods can cause significant damage to attics, soffits, and electrical wiring. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive squirrel removal services throughout Irvington, from the riverfront estates to Washington Avenue residences. Our humane removal process includes extraction, entry point sealing, and complete attic restoration.
whyUs: Our technicians are intimately familiar with Irvington's diverse architecture, from Victorian estates to modern Hudson River homes, and understand the unique squirrel pressure faced by properties near the Hermit's Glen and wooded areas. We provide fast response times to Irvington residents with licensed, insured professionals who prioritize humane wildlife solutions and lasting results.
localContext: Irvington's abundant oak and maple trees, particularly around the Old Croton Aqueduct Trail and near Matthiessen Park, create ideal habitats for gray squirrels seeking shelter in nearby homes. The village's historic housing stock with older rooflines and architectural details often provides multiple entry points that require expert identification and professional sealing.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Irvington, NY?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Irvington typically ranges from $900 to $2,500 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of attic damage. Larger historic homes or properties with multiple squirrels and significant exclusion work will be at the higher end. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How do squirrels get into Irvington attics?
faqs.answer: Squirrels in Irvington commonly enter through roof vents, damaged soffits, gaps in fascia boards, and construction gaps where tree branches overhang rooflines. The village's mature trees provide easy access to roofs, and older homes often have weathered wood or small openings that squirrels can chew through and expand. Our inspection identifies all vulnerable areas.

faqs.question: Are squirrels dangerous to Irvington homes?
faqs.answer: Yes, squirrels can cause extensive damage by chewing electrical wiring (creating fire hazards), tearing insulation, gnawing on wood beams, and creating entry points for water damage. They also leave droppings and urine that can contaminate insulation and create health concerns. Quick removal prevents escalating damage and costly repairs.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels in Irvington?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service to Irvington residents in most cases. The removal process typically takes 3-7 days depending on the number of squirrels and whether babies are present. We install one-way exclusion doors that allow squirrels to exit but not re-enter, then seal all entry points once we confirm all animals have left.
